text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 

16 
BENE_DSCHRG_STUS_CD 
LABEL: 
Code identifying status of patient as of CLM_THRU_DT 
DESCRIPTION: The code used to identify the status of the patient as of the CLM_THRU_DT. 
SHORT NAME: DSCHRGCD 
LONG NAME: BENE_DSCHRG_STUS_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
NCH 
VALUES: 
A = Discharged 
B = Died 
C = Still a patient 
COMMENT: 
This field is derived from the patient discharge status code
